headline: UnitedHealth Group Announces Earnings Release Date
summary: March 17, 2026--UnitedHealth Group (NYSE: UNH) will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, April 21, 2026, before the market opens, and will host a teleconference at 8:00 a.m. ET with analysts and investors. This call will be webcast on the Investor Relations page of the company’s website (www.unitedhealthgroup.com). The replay will be available through May 5, 2026, on the website.

headline: UNH Expands Doulas: Better Outcomes or Margin Play Ahead?
summary: UnitedHealth Group rolls out nationwide doula coverage, targeting better maternal outcomes and lower costs through preventive, value-based care.

headline: What Do You Need To Invest To Replace Your $95k Salary Just On Dividends Alone?
summary: Let’s cut through the noise and get real about replacing a $95,000 salary with dividend income alone. In today’s market (March 2026, with rates steady and inflation cooling), investors need a hefty nest egg to generate that kind of cash flow without touching principal. The math is straightforward.
